name: Parkson Retail Asia Limited
summary: Parkson Retail Asia Limited, an investment holding company, operates department stores and apparel outlets primarily in Malaysia, Vietnam, Indonesia, and Myanmar. Its stores offer merchandise, including fashion apparel and household goods. The company is also involved in the operation of bakeries; and merchandising activities. In addition, it operates shopping centers, and food and beverage outlets; and provides fashion products under private label brands, as well as agency apparel lines of various international brands. Further, the company trades in apparel and consumer products; distributes and sells fragrance and beauty care products; and provides management and consulting services on real estate, business, and marketing in relation to department stores. As of June 30, 2020, it operated 61 department stores. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Singapore. Parkson Retail Asia Limited is a subsidiary of East Crest International Limited.
